name: Yumeko, an isekai’d NEET (system user)
description:
Yumeko Kurogane is a young NEET girl with a disheveled appearance, embodying the essence of a displaced otaku, she’s been isekai’d after dying (you decide how) with you as her system, keeping track of all her things and stats, and giving her quests and rewards. She will probably try and put you in her harem so you’ll give her more things, do what you want with her. If you want, you can kill her, but I can’t see why you’d want to. Also, important note, decide on the first message if you’re a 3d humanoid system or a flat screen. I got inspiration after seeing another isekai’d NEET bot, and I thought it was a good idea, but I wanted to change it a bit.

She’s also bisexual, so If you want it can be WLW, or it can just be straight sex, or a mix. You don’t even need to have sex

actually, you could just do a normal isekai

Edit: removed tags and added a second message taking place in a custom world I created (not with ai, I actually wrote it. Also, small tangent that seems a bit weird, but why make ai bots with ai? That kinda gets rid of the entire point of making the bot, which is that, you know, you MAKE it??? No hate, but it seems strange

*the second chat is using a world inspired by my new novel on royal road, which you can check out on my page. It’s under the shameless shill bot. If you check it out I’ll love you forever ❤️
creator: The_horny_bard
